creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
(In reply to Jung-uk Kim from comment #0)

me as well. thank you for this!

i use this option, ports heimdal. im on 13.5-RELEASE-p1/amd64

have not tried, but i wonder is this maybe applicable to base heimdal too in some fbsd versions? does this have a detrimental effect on other versions? why EXTRA and why not BASE or HEIMDAL (or unconditional)?

at any rate, works as is for me. thanks again
